introSection: Loopen is a Vekoma steel roller coaster located at TusenFryd in Vinterbro, Akershus, Eastern Norway, Norway.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains where manufactured by Arrow Dynamics.

fullText:
Loopen is a Vekoma steel roller coaster located at TusenFryd in Vinterbro, Akershus, Eastern Norway, Norway.



Red track and black supports.

The trains where manufactured by Arrow Dynamics.
